hooks.command: CFG=~/.config/pluginterface/saywhen; [ -f "$CFG/mute" ] || say "$(p=$(cat "$CFG/prefix" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$p" ] && pwd | sed "s|^.*/$p/||" || basename "$(pwd)") blocked"
CFG=~/.config/pluginterface/saywhen; [ -f "$CFG/mute" ] || say "$(p=$(cat "$CFG/prefix" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$p" ] && pwd | sed "s|^.*/$p/||" || basename "$(pwd)") complete"
CFG=~/.config/pluginterface/saywhen; [ -f "$CFG/mute" ] || say "$(p=$(cat "$CFG/prefix" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$p" ] && pwd | sed "s|^.*/$p/||" || basename "$(pwd)") idle"
CFG=~/.config/pluginterface/saywhen; [ -f "$CFG/mute" ] || say "$(p=$(cat "$CFG/prefix" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$p" ] && pwd | sed "s|^.*/$p/||" || basename "$(pwd)") user input needed"
